message:
feat(extensions): add PolicySnapshot version hashing and import expansions

- extension_dispatcher.rs: add sha2::Digest import and new
  snapshot_version field (deterministic policy snapshot version hash
  for provenance/telemetry); expand imports to include Capability,
  PolicyCheck, and hash_canonical_json from extensions module
- tests/perf/reports/BENCH_SCHEMA.md: register phase1_matrix_validation
  schema in human-readable report
- tests/perf/reports/bench_schema_registry.json: add phase1 matrix
  validation entry to machine-readable schema registry

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -15,6 +15,7 @@
 | `pi.ext.conformance_report.v2` | Per-extension conformance report event |
 | `pi.ext.conformance_summary.v2` | Aggregate conformance summary with per-tier breakdowns |
 | `pi.perf.extension_benchmark_stratification.v1` | Layered extension benchmark artifact linking cold-load, per-call, and full E2E evidence with claim-integrity guards |
+| `pi.perf.phase1_matrix_validation.v1` | Phase-1 realistic/matched-state matrix validation with stage attribution and release-gate readiness |
 
 ## Environment Fingerprint
